purpose: Define a single, repeatable execution loop for planning and implementation to prevent drift.
design_intent: Make every change pass through the same intake -> plan -> implement -> verify -> update -> handover loop, with explicit artifacts and status updates.
change_impact: Changes affect how all planning artifacts and progress statuses are updated; skipping steps risks stale or duplicated plans.

stages.goal: Capture the request, link it to existing specs/plans, and define the minimal scope.
Identify drift, duplication, or missing contracts before changing anything.
Choose the execution tracker, write acceptance criteria, and list the smallest deliverables.
Apply the smallest change set that satisfies the acceptance criteria.
Run required checks and confirm behavior matches acceptance criteria.
Update planning docs, status checklists, and hard copy snapshot.
Record what changed, why, risks, and the next exact step.

status_rules.duplication_policy: Do not mirror the same task across multiple trackers. Link instead.

hard_copy.retention: Keep latest snapshot and the first snapshot per quarter.
